title: Diagnostic imaging dataset for September 2024
body: "The monthly diagnostics collection collects data on waiting times and activity for 15 key diagnostic tests and procedures. Data are shown at provider organisation level, from NHS Trusts, NHS Foundation Trusts and Independent Sector Providers. Data are also shown by Commissioning organisation, which are mainly Integrated Care Boards, but in addition, NHS England also nationally commissions some specialised services. Data for this collection is available back to January 2006.  Accredited official statistics are produced impartially and free from any political influence. "
